yearly.data_source: OneBuilding Climate.OneBuilding.org EPW / TMYx-CSWD processed locally
yearly.method_note: Monthly high/low are mean daily high/low; precipitation probability is wet days (>=1 mm/day); tourism score uses WeatherSpark-style 8:00-21:00 hourly apparent-temperature, cloud, and precipitation component scores.
yearly.overview: 寒冷气候，冬季漫长。 降水极丰沛。

methodology.source: OneBuilding EPW/TMYx-CSWD typical meteorological year files; WeatherSpark reference page was used for page structure and scoring thresholds, not as copied raw data.
methodology.temperature: Monthly high/low use the average of daily highs/lows, matching the climate-page convention better than one-month extremes.

tourism_score.formula: 0.50 * apparent-temperature score + 0.25 * cloud score + 0.25 * precipitation score, averaged across daytime hours by month
tourism_score.cloud_thresholds: Clear=10, mostly clear≈9, overcast=1; linear interpolation.
tourism_score.precip_thresholds: No precipitation=10, trace≈9, >=1 mm/hour=0; linear interpolation.
